explain: Caching Vue component instances without destroying them like native App in Vue SPA.

detail.desc: enter some text in the input，then push to next page
detail.tip: The text you enter here should stay on the cached page, so you can see it again when you come back.

aboutPage.desc1: Routing and navigation for your Vue SPA.
aboutPage.desc2: The idea comes from actual business needs, there is often such a need when developing WeChat and Hybrid App, Finally vue-stack-page was born.
aboutPage.desc3: Welcome to use, welcome to PR, hope to help you.

items.0: Extend vue-router without changing the original navigation flow.
items.1: A new rendered page instance is pushed into the stack on push or forward.
items.2: Going back restores the previous page and keeps its existing state.
items.3: Unused pages are removed from the stack after navigating back.
items.4: replace updates the page information stored in the stack.
items.5: Re-activating a cached page will trigger the activated hook.
items.6: Browser back and forward events are supported.
items.7: Route parameter changes can be handled correctly.
items.8: Cached state can still be restored after deeper navigation.
items.9: Form input can stay with the cached page state.
items.10: Page transitions feel closer to native mobile navigation.
items.11: The detail page can keep pushing new detail instances.
items.12: Returning from login still restores the previous page context.
items.13: A compact demo for mobile-oriented navigation caching.
